extDesc.message: AI bilingual subtitles for YouTube: semantic segmentation, precise alignment, adaptive pagination, custom styles, and SRT export.

aiApiKey.message: API Key (stored only on this device)

aiExtraBodyHint.message: Saved locally for the current API URL and model; use this for provider-specific options such as {"enable_thinking":false}.

aiExtraBodySaved.message: Extra request parameters saved. The current video will be translated again.

aiExtraBodySaveFailed.message: Could not save the parameters. Try again.

aiExtraBodyReserved.message: Extra parameters cannot override core subtitle protocol fields.

aiExtraBodyUnsafe.message: The parameters contain an unsafe object key.

aiExtraBodyTooComplex.message: The parameters are too large or deeply nested. Simplify them and try again.

aiPrefetchHint.message: 0 disables prefetch. Higher values cache more ahead, but may increase concurrent requests and cost.

aiHint.message: Uses a streaming Chat Completions-compatible API. Complete semantic units are carried across bounded translation windows.

aiKeyMissing.message: Enter an API Key to start translating.

aiBaseMissing.message: Enter a valid API Base URL.

aiStatusTimeout.message: The AI request timed out and was retried automatically.

aiStatusLimited.message: Too many AI requests; translation has been slowed temporarily.

aiStatusPartial.message: Some subtitles failed to translate and will retry when reached.

aiStatusKey.message: The API key was rejected. Enter it again.

aiStatusError.message: The AI service is temporarily unavailable and will retry during playback.

debugEmpty.message: No log yet. Enable logging and reproduce the issue first.

debugClearFailed.message: Could not clear the log. Please try again.

debugStarted.message: Diagnostics enabled. Refresh the video page and reproduce the issue.

debugStopped.message: Diagnostics stopped. The existing bundle can still be copied.

handleAria.message: Drag subtitles up or down, double-click to reset

exportSourceHint.message: Translation and bilingual exports use only fully cached AI translations.

exportNoTrans.message: The AI translation is not fully cached yet. Play or preload the complete video, then try again.

exportNoCues.message: No downloadable subtitles — play a few seconds so captions load, then try again.

exportNotYoutube.message: Open a YouTube video page to export.

exportFailed.message: Export failed — refresh the page and try again.
